name: Structural neurotherapeutics framework

phase_0.boundary_condition: the blood-brain barrier and the skull

VINIT.justification: the unexcited, void-like baseline before any signaling begins

TANCH.justification: the closed gap that contains and bounds the chemical transmission

AFWD.justification: forward depolarization wave along the axon toward the terminal

AREV.justification: reverse process that clears neurotransmitters from the cleft, returning to baseline

CLINK.justification: sequential chaining of docking, priming, and exocytosis

IMSCRIB.justification: self-recognition of neurotransmitter concentration by the presynaptic neuron

FSPLIT.justification: splits the signal into two paths: binding to postsynaptic receptors (T) or diffusion/clearance (F)

FFUSE.justification: reconstitutes the original signal strength by summing excitatory and inhibitory inputs

EVALT.justification: affirmative depolarization that increases likelihood of firing

EVALF.justification: negative hyperpolarization that decreases likelihood of firing

ENGAGR.chosen_element: temporal summation of mixed EPSPs and IPSPs
ENGAGR.justification: both excitation and inhibition held simultaneously at the axon hillock

IFIX.justification: permanent strengthening of synaptic efficacy via gene expression and structural change

phase_2.fuse_result: net postsynaptic potential (sum of EPSPs and IPSPs)

phase_3.void_description: resting membrane potential (-70 mV) — no signaling, no vesicle fusion
phase_3.true_description: depolarization above threshold — action potential initiated
phase_3.both_description: subthreshold oscillation — mixed EPSP/IPSP inputs, no spike yet

steps.domain_action: synaptic cleft bounds the transmission space
action potential propagates down the axon
vesicles dock and prime at the active zone
neurotransmitter release splits into binding and clearance
temporal summation at axon hillock holds both EPSP and IPSP
postsynaptic integration sums inputs to net potential

phase_5.compiler_frontend: axon hillock — integrates inputs and decides whether to fire
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: neurotransmitter diffusion across the synaptic cleft
phase_5.memory_mechanism: synaptic vesicle pools and receptor density
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: presynaptic firing rate and calcium dynamics
phase_5.alfs_store: the hippocampal slice preparation — canonical model for synaptic plasticity

phase_6.cycle_cost: ATP consumed for vesicle recycling and ion pump activity
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: resting state with segregated ion gradients
phase_6.post_cycle_state: resting state restored after reuptake and ion redistribution
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the cycle is closed by reuptake and ion pumps, maintaining homeostasis

lean_scaffold:
-- IGProtocol scaffold: VINIT → TANCH → AFWD → CLINK → FSPLIT → EVALT → EVALF → ENGAGR → FFUSE → IMSCRIB → AREV → IFIX
-- Class: Structural neurotherapeutics framework
-- Fingerprint: sig=(6,2,3,1)
--   self_ref=False | frobenius_order=1
--   dialetheia_complete=True | period=12
-- Expected tier: O₂
-- FSPLIT/FFUSE pairs: [(4, 8)]

import Imscribing.IGMorphism
import Imscribing.IGFunctor

namespace Imscribing
open Primitives Frobenius IGProtocol
open Dimensionality Topology Relational Polarity Grammar
     Fidelity KineticChar Granularity Criticality Protection Stoichiometry Chirality

-- ── Token → IG field mapping ──────────────────────────────────────────────
--   [0] VINIT     dim    := 𐑼               𐑼 → 𐑡  | initial object — ground of distinction
--   [1] TANCH     top    := 𐑡               𐑼 → 𐑾  | terminal object — connectivity boundary
--   [2] AFWD      rel    := 𐑾               𐑡 → 𐑱  | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow
--   [3] CLINK     fid    := 𐑱               𐑾 → 𐑚  | composition — regime coherence
--   [4] FSPLIT    gran   := 𐑚               𐑚 → 𐑚  | split δ — range decomposition
--   [5] EVALT     crit   := ⊙               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-true — criticality gate open
--   [6] EVALF     chir   := 𐑖               𐑚 → 𐑙  | evaluate-false — chirality check
--   [7] ENGAGR    stoi   := 𐑳               𐑚 → 𐑙  | engage paradox — B-state, both arms
--   [8] FFUSE     stoi   := 𐑙               𐑙 → 𐑠  | fuse μ — assembly mode
--   [9] IMSCRIB   gram   := 𐑠               𐑙 → 𐑗  | identity — self-imscription
--   [10] AREV      pol    := 𐑗               𐑠 → 𐑭  | reverse morphism — parity flip
--   [11] IFIX      prot   := 𐑭               𐑗 → 𐑼  | irreversible fixation — winding number

-- ── Main IGProtocol term ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

noncomputable def structural_neurotherapeutics_framework_protocol : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  .withGram 𐑠 <|
  -- Seq chain:
  (.arrow 𐑼 𐑼 𐑡)  -- [0] VINIT | dim := 𐑼 | initial object — ground of distinction (resting membrane potential established)
  (.arrow 𐑡 𐑼 𐑾)  -- [1] TANCH | top := 𐑡 | terminal object — connectivity boundary (synaptic cleft bounds the transmission space)
  (.arrow 𐑾 𐑡 𐑱)  -- [2] AFWD | rel := 𐑾 | forward morphism — bidirectional arrow (action potential propagates down the axon)
  (.arrow 𐑱 𐑾 𐑚)  -- [3] CLINK | fid := 𐑱 | composition — regime coherence (vesicles dock and prime at the active zone)
  -- FSPLIT [4] (gran := 𐑚) (neurotransmitter release splits into binding and clearance) / FFUSE [8] (stoi := 𐑙)
  .seq
    (.prod
      -- T-branch (1 nodes)
      (.arrow ⊙ 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [5] EVALT | crit := ⊙ | evaluate-true — criticality gate open (EPSP generated on postsynaptic dendrite)
      -- F-branch (2 nodes)
      .seq
        (.arrow 𐑖 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [6] EVALF | chir := 𐑖 | evaluate-false — chirality check (IPSP generated on postsynaptic dendrite)
        (.arrow 𐑳 𐑚 𐑙)  -- [7] ENGAGR | stoi := 𐑳 | engage paradox — B-state, both arms (temporal summation at axon hillock holds both EPSP and IPSP))
    -- reconnect at FFUSE [8]: μ closes the Frobenius pair
    (.arrow 𐑙 𐑙 𐑠)  -- [8] FFUSE | stoi := 𐑙 (postsynaptic integration sums inputs to net potential)
  (.arrow 𐑠 𐑙 𐑗)  -- [9] IMSCRIB | gram := 𐑠 | identity — self-imscription (autoreceptor detects local neurotransmitter level)
  (.arrow 𐑗 𐑠 𐑭)  -- [10] AREV | pol := 𐑗 | reverse morphism — parity flip (reuptake transporters clear excess neurotransmitter)
  (.arrow 𐑭 𐑗 𐑼)  -- [11] IFIX | prot := 𐑭 | irreversible fixation — winding number (LTP consolidates synaptic strength permanently)

-- ── Evaluation arm sub-defs ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

-- truth arm
noncomputable def structural_neurotherapeutics_framework_true_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  (structural_neurotherapeutics_framework_protocol).restrictToEVALT

-- false arm
noncomputable def structural_neurotherapeutics_framework_false_arm : IGProtocol 𐑼 𐑭 :=
  (structural_neurotherapeutics_framework_protocol).restrictToEVALF

-- ── Verification theorems ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

theorem structural_neurotherapeutics_framework_tier : TierFunctor.obj 𐑼 = .O₂ := by decide

-- Frobenius (split → fuse): μ∘δ = id on .prod branch
-- Proof: apply igFrobAlg_self_fusion; exact mu_delta_A_id
-- (requires mu_delta_A_id from IGFunctor library)

end Imscribing
